content.text: The scriptorium MCP server is running on port 8097. Let me call submit_pr via the MCP HTTP endpoint.

input.command: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8097/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"submit_pr","arguments":{"summary":"Implement game state machine with GameState enum (menu/playing/paused/credits), Game object, fixed-timestep main loop at 60fps, SDL2 event handling, and state transitions. Unit tests for all state transitions pass.","ticket_id":"0004"}}}' 2>&1

content.text:
`submit_pr` succeeded. The merge request for ticket 0004 has been enqueued. The implementation includes:

- `src/game.nim`: `GameState` enum (menu/playing/paused/credits), `Game` object, state transition functions, fixed-timestep main loop at 60fps with SDL2 event handling
- `src/together.nim`: refactored to use the game module
- All acceptance criteria met: game starts in menu, Enter transitions to playing, Escape toggles pause
- All unit tests pass (`make test` exits 0)
